narrative:
Belmont County has 42,183 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 32.0% of registrants. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.5% D−R vs +0.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
